notes: Core structure exists but the river/road row mapping is deeply broken — the river occupies rows 7-13 in a 16-row grid yet the canvas is only ~16 cells tall with misaligned Y calculations, causing the frog to almost immediately trigger drowning/death on any river row, logs and turtles render in wrong positions relative to the river background, and the home bay check fires incorrectly making the game nearly unwinnable; controls work but the keyProcessed flag causes sluggish single-step movement with no held-key repeat.
